title: crotalaria bhutanica
intro: Crotalaria bhutanica is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, known for its medicinal and ornamental value. The plant is traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine. Its health benefits include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and prevent cancer. Crotalaria bhutanica is often used in herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
